stemHtml:
Three aircraft: (1), (2), and (3) arrive successively at ten minute intervals, overhead the scene of a recent aircraft accident.

(1) is unable to establish contact with the Search and Rescue Centre
(2) is able to contact the Search and Rescue Centre
(3) is a Search and Rescue helicopter

The command of the situation is the responsibility of…

options.a: (1), then by mutual consent (2) and then (3).
options.c: (1), and then by mutual consent to (3).
options.d: (2), then by mutual consent (3) until the completion of operations.
